scripts.deploy: node scripts/generate-wrangler.js && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file=src/schema.sql && wrangler deploy --keep-vars
scripts.db:init: D1_DB_ID=${D1_DB_ID:-local} node scripts/generate-wrangler.js && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=src/schema.sql
scripts.db:reset: D1_DB_ID=${D1_DB_ID:-local} node scripts/generate-wrangler.js && rm -rf .wrangler/state/v3/d1/miniflare-D1DatabaseObject && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=src/schema.sql
scripts.db:clean: D1_DB_ID=${D1_DB_ID:-local} node scripts/generate-wrangler.js && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=src/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=scripts/clean-local-d1.sql
scripts.db:migrate:random-key: D1_DB_ID=${D1_DB_ID:-local} node scripts/generate-wrangler.js && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=scripts/migrate-add-random-key.sql
